_comment: legacy/home-prefs.json — DELIBERATE MESS. A different team stored Home prefs as JSON. Note: keyed by display label in some cases, by slug in others. One accessibility toggle got dropped in here by mistake (see _bug).
_bug: the 'underline_links' entry below is an ACCESSIBILITY preference, not a Home one. It needs to move during migration.

preferences.label: Get recommendations to organize your channels
Show a dot on the Home icon when there is unread activity
Show profile photos next to DMs
Separate private channels from public ones in sidebar
Separate direct messages and apps from channels in sidebar
Move items with unread Mentions to top of sections
Organize external conversations into the External Connections section
Hide muted channels from your sidebar
